title: Korak 9

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents: Want to hear a short story?
challengeFiles.seed: Want to hear a short story?

challengeFiles.name: script
styles

tests.text: Vaš predmet za storyObj mora imati tri svojstva: scary, funny, i adventure.

Atribut od story za scary treba da ima vrednost niza karaktera "In the dark woods, a group of friends stumbled upon an old, abandoned cabin. They enter the cabin and awaken something malevolent that had been dormant for centuries."
Svojstvo borderColor za scary treba da ima vrednost niza znakova "#ee4b2b".

Atribut za story za funny treba da ima vrednost niza karaktera "During a camping trip, Mark decided to show off his culinary skills by cooking dinner over an open fire. However, his attempt caused him to burn the dinner as well as his eyebrows off."
tests.testString: assert.equal(storyObj.funny.story, "During a camping trip, Mark decided to show off his culinary skills by cooking dinner over an open fire. However, his attempt caused him to burn the dinner as well as his eyebrows off.");

tests.text: Svojstvo borderColor za funny treba da ima vrednost sekvence karaktera "#f1be32".

Svojstvo story za adventure treba da ima vrednost niza karaktera "Lost in the heart of the Amazon rain forest, Sarah and Jake stumbled upon an ancient temple. They braved deadly traps and encountered strange wildlife, all while deciphering cryptic clues left behind by a mysterious civilization."
tests.testString: assert.equal(storyObj.adventure.story, "Lost in the heart of the Amazon rain forest, Sarah and Jake stumbled upon an ancient temple. They braved deadly traps and encountered strange wildlife, all while deciphering cryptic clues left behind by a mysterious civilization.");

tests.text: Svojstvo borderColor za adventure mora imati vrednost tekstualnog niza "#acd157".

description:
Da biste sačuvali različite vrste priča, kreirajte nešto nazvano storyObj. To bi trebalo da ima tri svojstva: scary, funny i adventure. Svaka vrednost svojstva bi trebalo da bude nešto sa svojstvima story i borderColor.

Postavite sledeće vrednosti za lične podatke:

  • scary:

    • story: In the dark woods, a group of friends stumbled upon an old, abandoned cabin. They enter the cabin and awaken something malevolent that had been dormant for centuries.
    • borderColor: #ee4b2b

  • funny:

    • story: During a camping trip, Mark decided to show off his culinary skills by cooking dinner over an open fire. However, his attempt caused him to burn the dinner as well as his eyebrows off.
    • borderColor: #f1be32

  • adventure:

    • story: Lost in the heart of the Amazon rain forest, Sarah and Jake stumbled upon an ancient temple. They braved deadly traps and encountered strange wildlife, all while deciphering cryptic clues left behind by a mysterious civilization.
    • borderColor: #acd157
